channel.title: Home on Will Coughlin
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Will Coughlin

item.title: Projects
item.description: Predicting Power Grid Abnormalities OptionAlly Site | App Repository | Server Repository OptionAlly was a simple profit/loss calculator for stock options. The calculator supported a multitude of strategies to support the user’s goals and experience level. After selecting an underlying stock and configuring the option strategy, the user could make decisions based on calculated risk and reward of his or her prospective trade. This is a comprehensive project where I learned how to create React Native apps with Expo and to develop a GraphQL APIs with Apollo Server.
